(iii) Add the longitudes of Mandi and Saturn. Multiply
the sum by 9. Note the resulting sign and Navariisa. When
Saturn arrives at this Sign and Arhsa, the event may take place.
(i ) Add the longtitudes of the lords of the 6th, Bth and 12th
houses. The call may come when Saturn comes to this resulting
Sign or its trine
(v) Find out the weakest of the three sets of planets, viz. (1)
lords of the Bth houses counted from the ascendant and the
Moon. (2) lords of the 22nd decanates, and (3) the Moon and
Mandi. Note the Navariisa occupied by that planet. When
Saturn arrives at this Arhsa or its trine, the call is likely
to come.

232 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
Note the Sign which happens to be the Navariisa occupied
by the lord of the ascendant. See how far it is removed from
Aries. Count so many signs from the one Occupied by the
lord of the Sth house. When Saturn comes to this sign during
transit, death may overtake the subject. [Suppose Cancer to
